systems.name: EOS
systems.description: Core ETRM application — trade capture, cargo operations, valuations, settlement

systems.name: RabbitMQ
systems.description: Single message broker instance — all integration flows through this

systems.name: EOS Scheduler EOD
systems.description: End-of-day batch scheduler — triggers EOD processing in EOS

systems.name: DQ Prices
systems.description: External price data provider — supplies market prices to EOS

systems.name: ICE
systems.description: Intercontinental Exchange — source of exchange-traded data

systems.name: KTP
systems.description: ICE data adapter — receives raw ICE data and normalises it

systems.name: Shovel
systems.description: RabbitMQ Shovel plugin — moves messages from KTP into the main RabbitMQ instance

systems.name: Pioneer
systems.description: Downstream system — receives trade/recap data and settlement data from EOS

systems.name: Credit Cube
systems.description: Credit risk management system — receives exposure data from EOS

systems.name: Endur
systems.description: Legacy ETRM — source of Spanish gas trade data

systems.name: VaR Engine
systems.description: Value-at-Risk calculation engine — receives position data from EOS

systems.name: a2kvan
systems.description: Port distance calculation service — provides voyage distance data to EOS

health.message: Manual process — no automated health check

systems.name: AX Cloud Shared Drive
systems.description: SharePoint / cloud storage — EOS exports invoices as PDF here

systems.name: SAP Document
systems.description: SAP financial system — receives settlement documents from EOS

integrationComponents.name: Glint ICE Trade Capture
integrationComponents.description: Consumes ICE trade data from RabbitMQ, transforms and writes to EOS

integrationComponents.name: Glint Price Loading
integrationComponents.description: Loads price/curve data into EOS from external sources

health.message: Responding but slow — DQ feed latency elevated

integrationComponents.issue: Slow ingress — DQ feed latency elevated (342ms, threshold 200ms)

integrationComponents.name: Glint Price EoD Export
integrationComponents.description: Exports end-of-day settlement prices from EOS

integrationComponents.name: Glint Pioneer Trade Connector
integrationComponents.description: Pushes trade/recap data from EOS to Pioneer

integrationComponents.name: Glint Pioneer Settlements Connector
integrationComponents.description: Pushes settlement data from EOS to Pioneer

integrationComponents.name: Glint HQ PnL Reporting
integrationComponents.description: Extracts P&L data from EOS and pushes to HQ reporting system

integrationComponents.name: Glint Credit Cube
integrationComponents.description: Pushes credit exposure data from EOS to Credit Cube

integrationComponents.name: Glint Endur Spanish Gas
integrationComponents.description: Imports Spanish gas trades from Endur into EOS

integrationComponents.name: Glint VaR Extract
integrationComponents.description: Extracts position data from EOS for VaR calculation

integrationComponents.name: Glint MA
integrationComponents.description: Master Agreements / Settlements connector — pushes settlement data to SAP

dataFlows.name: Price Ingress
dataFlows.description: Market prices from DQ Prices into EOS for curve building and valuation

dataFlows.name: ICE Trade Ingress
dataFlows.description: Exchange-traded data from ICE through KTP/Shovel pipeline into EOS

dataFlows.name: Trade/Recap to Pioneer
dataFlows.description: Trade lifecycle events pushed to Pioneer for downstream processing

dataFlows.name: Settlements to Pioneer
dataFlows.description: Settlement completion events pushed to Pioneer

dataFlows.name: Spanish Gas Trade Import
dataFlows.description: Spanish gas trades from Endur legacy system into EOS

dataFlows.name: VaR Position Extract
dataFlows.description: Position data extracted from EOS for VaR engine processing

dataFlows.name: Credit Exposure Update
dataFlows.description: Credit exposure data pushed to Credit Cube on trade events and EOD

dataFlows.name: HQ PnL Reporting
dataFlows.description: P&L reports extracted and pushed to HQ reporting system

dataFlows.name: Settlement to SAP
dataFlows.description: Settlement documents generated and pushed to SAP via Glint MA

dataFlows.name: Invoice PDF Export
dataFlows.description: EOS exports invoices as PDF to AX Cloud shared drive

dataFlows.name: Port Distance Manual Pull
dataFlows.description: Operators manually retrieve port distance data from a2kvan into EOS

dataFlows.name: EOD Batch Trigger
dataFlows.description: EOS Scheduler triggers end-of-day processing in EOS

exchanges.name: eos.inbound
exchanges.description: Inbound data flowing INTO EOS from external systems

exchanges.name: eos.outbound
exchanges.description: Outbound data flowing FROM EOS to downstream systems

exchanges.name: eos.internal
exchanges.description: Internal EOS events (audit, notifications, scheduler triggers)
